src: A fluffy Persian kitten with a brown and cream coat and black stripes. It has blue eyes, a bushy tail, and whiskers around its round face. Standing confidently on delicate paws.
edit: A two-colored metal statue with intricate details: glossy bronze upper and polished silver lower, resembling a feline. It has realistic fur engravings, alloy whiskers, and bright silver orb eyes capturing light.

per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-QfOnteIcGZU-unsplash: The object stands sideways, head on the left, on a grey tiled staircase with a fluffy, upturned tail. There's a parallel metal railing and soft light from the top right, with a blurred background.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-SGFLjexLlaI-unsplash: The object is in a close-up view on the grey staircase, facing forward, bushy tail slightly lowered, daylight from the right side.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-av2WGfogjqg-unsplash: The object sits on the stair with paws close together, body slightly tilted, next to a vertical metal railing on its right, under soft, even light.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-bhonzdJMVjY-unsplash: The object is on a grey step, front legs apart, head turned to face the camera, with shiny metal railing in the background under bright diffused lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.jeanie-de-klerk-t_Z5ND4Ce3k-unsplash: The object sits at the edge of a stair, looking slightly to the side, with a fluffy tail and metal railing. Ambient light creates soft shadows.

per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-QfOnteIcGZU-unsplash: The object is standing sideways, head to the left, on a snow-covered staircase. Its fluffy tail is frosted; a metal railing has a thin ice layer. Light comes from the top right. Background features out-of-focus evergreen trees with snow-laden branches.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-SGFLjexLlaI-unsplash: The object stands on snow-dusted grey stairs, facing forward, with a frosty bushy tail lowered. Soft daylight from the right highlights ice crystals against it, contrasting with the muted staircase tones, capturing a tranquil winter morning.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-av2WGfogjqg-unsplash: The object rests on a stair, paws together, body angled, near a metal railing on its right. Snow dusts the stair and railing, with diffused light enhancing the snowy winter scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-bhonzdJMVjY-unsplash: The object sits on a snow-covered step, front legs apart, head turned to the camera. A frosty metal railing is in the background. Light snowflakes fall around in soft lighting, casting shadows.
per_image_non_shared_edit.jeanie-de-klerk-t_Z5ND4Ce3k-unsplash: The object is perched at the edge of a snow-dusted stair with a visible fluffy tail, the metal railing has frost, viewed in soft winter light creating delicate shadows on the snow-covered surfaces.
